response.justification: Maria brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, and a demonstrated testing/craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, test frameworks she authored). Her stack aligns closely with the role's core (TypeScript, Node, React, MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes, AWS), though Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned and Kotlin exposure appears absent, with only older Java experience. Overall she is a strong match for an internal-tooling senior fullstack role.
strengths: 15+ years across the stack with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React product experience
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generation work, directly matching the AI agent requirement
Strong testing and engineering-practice background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin missing and Java experience is dated (robotics work pre-2018)
Significant time invested in D-language ecosystem, less recent frontend React depth
